text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, it's time for the Shuka Sho—the G1 race
that concludes the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think will win this time around? I've
got a feeling it's gonna be Hishi Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I heard she trained like mad over the summer. I
can't wait to see her race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is more than excited to watch the
showdown play out. Meanwhile, over in the
waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"Narita Brian won a sweeping victory in the
Japanese Derby. Is the Kikuka Sho as good as
hers?"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha! Man, they sure have a lot to say!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But they've got a point! She'll probably smash
another record! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, knowing her, she totally will do it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm all fired up! I'll give her a run for her
money! I'm gonna go warm up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As she grabs her bag, an envelope falls out of it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? The heck is this? ...A letter?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's see what it has to say...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"We can't wait to see you absolutely crush this
race. Go and take 'em all down!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"We packed your favorite licorice into the
envelope too. The whole dorm's cheering for
you!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Sheesh. When'd they slip this into my bag?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes a piece of licorice from the envelope
and pops it into her mouth.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Mm, that's good. It tastes just like home.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Everyone's gonna be watching—can't
forget that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain finally rises on the final leg of the
Triple Tiara—the Shuka Sho!
